Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 646}Everyone says tomorrow is the ordinary sightseeing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 646}What's so "ordinary" about it? Well, I'll just follow along and see for myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 646}Tomorrow's the last day of the trip... I should find somewhere else to sightsee.[n]{f 1 1}
